name: opc-develop
description: Budget-first product development with real core journeys, runnable increments, revision-bound evidence, and reviews that stop

interface.shortDescription: Budgeted increments through real user journeys and fresh evidence
interface.longDescription: opc-develop is a budget-first product development suite for Claude Code and Codex. Use vibe only for explicitly human-accepted unverified code, lite for one change under 60 minutes, and build for one 1-4 hour standard increment. Build creates a one-page result card, proves one real core journey, reaches a production-assembled vertical slice within 45 minutes, expands in runnable slices, verifies from cheap logic checks through browser and optional one-shot provider canary, and emits a revision-bound acceptance receipt. UI completion requires the browser to perform the key action. A reality review and final review share a hard two-repair stop-loss; subagents are exceptional cold-context tasks and full-conversation dispatch is forbidden. Brainstorm, demo, PRD, and architecture remain explicit opt-in decision tools. Ship, deploy, oncall, harness, retro, executable benchmarks, SHA freshness, language-adaptive reports, and release safety complete the loop.
defaultPrompt: Use $vibe to implement this immediately without tests; I will perform the acceptance.
Use $lite to handle this small request on the current branch with targeted tests and before/after evidence.
Use $build to deliver this as one <=4-hour increment through a real core journey with a fresh acceptance receipt.
